# Aakash Pahuja

> Senior Software Engineer at Squarespace, based in Dublin, Ireland. I build exceptional, scalable, and user-centric web platforms. This is my personal portfolio and blog, covering frontend architecture, AI in software engineering, developer tools, and browser extensions.

I'm a Senior Frontend Engineer specializing in scalable web platforms (currently building a Component Development Kit at Squarespace). Previously a Product Engineer at Intercom, with prior work at BlueStacks and Samsung R&D. I'm an active open-source contributor (119+ public repositories), a Chrome & Mozilla extension developer, and have tutored 300+ students in competitive programming. The blog focuses heavily on AI's impact on software engineering, careers, and developer productivity.

## Main

- [Home](https://www.aakashpahuja.com/): Overview, hero, and introduction
- [About](https://www.aakashpahuja.com/#about): Background, experience, and career highlights
- [Skills](https://www.aakashpahuja.com/#skills): Technologies and areas of expertise
- [Experience](https://www.aakashpahuja.com/#jobs): Work history (Squarespace, Intercom, BlueStacks, Samsung R&D, Coding Ninjas)
- [Work](https://www.aakashpahuja.com/#projects): Featured projects and open-source work
- [Contact](https://www.aakashpahuja.com/#contact): Get in touch
- [Resume](https://www.aakashpahuja.com/resume.pdf): Full résumé (PDF)

- [I Built a ZSH Plugin That Screams FAAAH When Your Command Fails](https://www.aakashpahuja.com/blog/faahzsh-terminal-error-sound)

- [The Human vs Machine Coding Timeline: When Will AI Truly Replace Software Developers?](https://www.aakashpahuja.com/blog/human-vs-machine-coding-timeline)
- [Is AGI Becoming Obsolete? What Today's Leaders Are Saying](https://www.aakashpahuja.com/blog/is-agi-becoming-obsolete)
- [Senior Software Engineers and AI Adoption: Overcoming Skepticism in Tech Teams](https://www.aakashpahuja.com/blog/senior-engineers-ai-adoption)
